---
title: "Interactive Demos"
toc: false
format:
  html
resources:
  - "scrennshot/*.png"
  - "scripts/*.py"
listing:
  contents:
    - scripts-gallery.yml
  type: grid
  sort: false
  id: demos
---

### Why this?

This page contains a collection of the interactive demonstrations written as playable [Marimo notebooks](https://docs.marimo.io),  which we’ve been using in our lecture notes as well as assignments.  This page serves as a compilation of all the interactive examples. You **DO NOT** need to have a server in order to run these demos, as they are written in WebAssembly and accessible in your browser.

Many of the examples showcase how the equations in our class can be transformed in to simple simulations. Click a tile below to interact with them! 


:::{#demos}
:::
